meta.title: US Air Force F-35 crashes in Alaska: What does that mean? #f35 #usdefensenews
meta.description:
A U.S. Air Force F-35A crashed in Alaska yesterday, so let's talk about what that means for the F-35 program as a whole. 

Stay on top of important Defense news by subscribing to Sandboxx!
